summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin Dashboard P1 feature. All 20 backend API tests pass. All frontend UI tests pass. Features verified: Admin login, stats display, create café user, activate/deactivate users, reset password, delete users, search functionality, regular users blocked from admin routes, deactivated users cannot login.

minor.issue: Users with is_active=null are counted as inactive in stats. This is a data consistency issue for older users created before admin feature. Not blocking functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: Admin Dashboard implementation is well-structured with proper role-based access control
Admin API endpoints correctly use get_admin_user dependency for authorization
Login endpoint correctly blocks deactivated users with 403 status
Admin cannot modify other admin accounts (protection implemented)
All data-testid attributes present for interactive elements in AdminDashboard.js
adminAPI in services/api.js correctly implements all admin endpoints
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used admin setup endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Dashboard P1 feature is fully implemented and tested. 20 backend pytest tests cover: admin login, stats, CRUD operations on users, password reset, access control for regular users, and protection against admin self-modification. Frontend tests verified: admin sidebar navigation, stats cards (4), user table, create user dialog, search, activate/deactivate, reset password dialogs. Regular users correctly blocked from /admin route with toast notification and redirect.

features_verified.admin_login_works_correctly: PASS - Admin can login and receives role=admin in user object
features_verified.admin_dashboard_shows_stats: PASS - Shows Total Cafés, Active Accounts, Total Campaigns, Content Generated
features_verified.admin_can_create_cafe_accounts: PASS - Dialog opens, creates user with brand, success toast shown
features_verified.admin_can_deactivate_activate_users: PASS - Toggle button works, status badge updates correctly
features_verified.admin_can_reset_user_passwords: PASS - Reset dialog works, old password stops working, new password works
features_verified.admin_can_delete_user_accounts: PASS - Delete removes user from DB, user cannot login after deletion
features_verified.search_functionality_filters_users: PASS - Filters table by café name or email
features_verified.regular_users_cannot_access_admin: PASS - Redirected to /dashboard with 'Admin access required' toast
features_verified.deactivated_users_cannot_login: PASS - Returns 403 with 'Account is deactivated' message
